sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40149" key="e)pimei/romai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιμείρομαι</orth>, <sense id="n40149.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be assigned by fate</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:346:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">346.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
